intended_use: FlightPlan for Liver is a post processing software package that helps the analysis of 3D X-ray angiography images of the liver. Its output is intended to be used by physicians as an adjunct means to h
intended_use_full: FlightPlan for Liver is a post processing software package that helps the analysis of 3D X-ray angiography images of the liver. Its output is intended to be used by physicians as an adjunct means to help visualize vasculature and identify arteries leading to the vicinity of hypervascular regions of interest in the liver.
target_condition: Hypervascular lesions in the liver requiring embolization procedures
ground_truth: For Virtual Parenchyma Visualization algorithm: selective contrast injected CBCT exams from same patients used as ground truth
other_metrics: Clinical assessment using 5-point Likert scale; algorithms met predefined acceptance criteria
